messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Subnet Resource

### Private Subnet

```hcl
resource "oci_core_subnet" "private_subnet" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  vcn_id         = oci_core_vcn.vcn.id
  cidr_block    = "10.0.1.0/24"
  display_name  = "private-subnet"
  subnet_domain_name = "private.myvcn.oraclevcn.com"

  prohibit_public_ip_on_vnic = true

  security_list_ids = [oci_core_security_list.private_sl.id]
}
```

### Public Subnet

```hcl
resource "oci_core_subnet" "public_subnet" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  vcn_id         = oci_core_vcn.vcn.id
  cidr_block    = "10.0.2.0/24"
  display_name  = "public-subnet"

  prohibit_public_ip_on_vnic = false
}
```

### DNS Label

- Required para internet hostname
- Max 15 chars
- Alphanumeric
